name: sabre-blade-mcp
title: Sabre Travel Platform
description: Search flights, hotels, and rental cars on the Sabre GDS. Book and manage trips with 15 tools, token-efficient output, and dual write-gates on all booking operations.
tagline: Flights, hotels, cars, and trip management via the Sabre GDS
author: groupthink-dev
contract_notes: Implements travel-v1 contract — air shopping (Bargain Finder Max), hotel search, car rental, trip management. 13 read tools + 3 write-gated tools.

highlights.text: Air — search 420+ airlines (ATPCO, LCC, NDC), price itineraries, seat maps, fare rules
Hotels — search 2M+ properties, rates, availability, property content
Cars — 40+ rental brands across 40,000 locations worldwide
Trips — retrieve, list, and cancel PNRs with full segment detail

readme:
### What it does

Sabre Travel Platform provides 15 MCP tools for searching, pricing, and booking travel through the Sabre GDS (Global Distribution System). It covers the full travel workflow: shop for flights across 420+ airlines, search 2M+ hotel properties, compare rental cars from 40+ brands, and manage bookings via PNR operations.

### Why another Sabre MCP?

Sabre's official MCP server is enterprise-only — locked inside SabreMosaic with no public repo, no npm package, and no self-host option. This blade provides the same capabilities as an open-source, self-hosted MCP with token-efficient output and dual safety gates.

### Key design choices

- **Token-efficient formatters** strip 60%+ of raw GDS response — agents see fares, schedules, and rates without parsing XML-era field bloat
- **Dual write-gates** on all booking operations — env var (`SABRE_WRITE_ENABLED=true`) AND per-call `confirm: true` prevent accidental live reservations
- **7-day token caching** — Sabre's sessionless OAuth tokens are cached and refreshed proactively, eliminating per-request auth overhead
- **Dual transport** — stdio for Claude Desktop/Code, HTTP for remote access via tunnels

### Tools

**Air (5 tools):** `sabre_air_search` · `sabre_air_price` · `sabre_air_rules` · `sabre_air_seatmap` · `sabre_air_book`

**Hotel (3 tools):** `sabre_hotel_search` · `sabre_hotel_avail` · `sabre_hotel_content` · `sabre_hotel_book`

**Trip (3 tools):** `sabre_trip_get` · `sabre_trip_list` · `sabre_trip_cancel`

**Utility (4 tools):** `sabre_geo_search` · `sabre_airline_lookup` · `sabre_destinations` · `sabre_car_search`

env.name: SABRE_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Sabre API client ID from developer.sabre.com

env.name: SABRE_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Sabre API client secret (paired with client ID)

env.name: SABRE_PCC
env.description: Pseudo City Code (PCC) — identifies your agency/organization in the Sabre GDS

env.name: SABRE_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Set to 'true' to enable booking and cancellation operations (write gate)

setup.blurb: Search flights, hotels, and cars across the Sabre Global Distribution System. Book and manage trips with safety gates.
setup.help_text: Sign up at developer.sabre.com to get sandbox credentials (Client ID, Client Secret, PCC). Production access requires a commercial agreement with Sabre.

fields.label: Client ID
fields.help: Create an app at developer.sabre.com to get your Client ID

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.help: The secret key associated with your Client ID

fields.label: Pseudo City Code
fields.help: Your agency's PCC — provided when you register with Sabre. Sandbox accounts have a test PCC.

fields.label: Environment
fields.help: Defaults to 'cert' (sandbox). Set to 'production' only after verifying with sandbox.

prerequisites: Sabre developer account (free sandbox at developer.sabre.com)

scenarios.label: Search and price a round-trip flight
scenarios.body: Search for flights from SYD to LAX departing next month in economy class. Pick the cheapest non-stop option, price it to confirm availability and fare, then show the fare rules for cancellation penalties.

scenarios.label: Find hotels near an airport
scenarios.body: Search for 4+ star hotels near LAX for a 3-night stay. Get detailed rates for the best-value property, then retrieve full property content including amenities and check-in times.

scenarios.label: Plan a multi-modal trip
scenarios.body: Look up the airport code for 'Queenstown New Zealand', search for flights from Sydney, find hotels near the destination airport, and compare rental car options for the trip dates.

notes: First GDS (Global Distribution System) blade MCP. TypeScript, dual transport (stdio + HTTP). 15 tools (13 read + 3 write-gated), travel-v1 contract. OAuth 2.0 client credentials with 7-day token cache.
